headline: Is Western Digital Corporation (WDC) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is WDC a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Western Digital Corporation on Studio Innovation’s Substack by Studio. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on WDC. Western Digital Corporation’s share was trading at $530.60 as of May 27th. WDC’s trailing and forward P/E were 31.75 and 27.86 respectively according […]
